title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Booking Vacation
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. Leave is accrued monthly at a rate of 1.67 days. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the HR portal at least four weeks in advance of your desired leave dates. This allows for adequate planning and ensures that your absence can be accommodated. Your manager will review the request and confirm approval within five business days. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember to check your leave balance before submitting your request to ensure you have enough accrued days for your planned vacation.
